missing_endpoint_from_midpoint: Point M is the midpoint of segment PQ. Points P and M are shown. Which lettered candidate is point Q?
M is the midpoint of PQ. With P and M plotted, choose the lettered point for Q.
Using M as the midpoint of segment PQ, which candidate point is Q?
Point P and midpoint M are plotted for segment PQ. Which lettered point completes endpoint Q?
Which lettered candidate is the other endpoint Q if M is the midpoint of PQ?
missing_startpoint_from_midpoint: Point M is the midpoint of segment PQ. Points Q and M are shown. Which lettered candidate is point P?
M is the midpoint of PQ. With Q and M plotted, choose the lettered point for P.
Using M as the midpoint of segment PQ, which candidate point is P?
Point Q and midpoint M are plotted for segment PQ. Which lettered point completes endpoint P?
Which lettered candidate is the other endpoint P if M is the midpoint of PQ?
one_third_from_p_to_q: Points P and Q are shown. Which lettered candidate is one-third of the way from P to Q?
Choose the candidate point located one-third along segment PQ, starting at P.
Which lettered point lies at one-third of the distance from P toward Q?
On segment PQ, which candidate is the point one-third from P to Q?
Find the lettered candidate at the one-third section point from P toward Q.
two_thirds_from_p_to_q: Points P and Q are shown. Which lettered candidate is two-thirds of the way from P to Q?
Choose the candidate point located two-thirds along segment PQ, starting at P.
Which lettered point lies at two-thirds of the distance from P toward Q?
On segment PQ, which candidate is the point two-thirds from P to Q?
Find the lettered candidate at the two-thirds section point from P toward Q.
translate_point: Which lettered candidate is the image of point P after the translation shown in the diagram?
Apply the shown translation to point P. Which lettered candidate is the image point?
Which candidate point is P after the translation written on the diagram?
Use the displayed translation for point P. Which lettered point is the result?
After translating point P as shown, which lettered candidate is P'?
translate_by_reference_vector: Use vector RS as the translation vector for point P. Which lettered candidate is P'?
Translate P by the vector from R to S. Which candidate point is the image?
Which lettered point is the image of P after translating by vector RS?
Apply the reference vector RS to point P. Which candidate is P'?
Using the directed vector from R to S, choose the translated image of P.
reflect_over_vertical_line: Which lettered candidate is the reflection of point P across the marked vertical line?
Reflect point P over the shown vertical line. Which candidate point is P'?
Which lettered point is P' after reflection across the vertical line in the diagram?
Use the marked vertical reflection line. Which candidate is the image of P?
After reflecting P over the displayed vertical line, which lettered candidate is P'?
reflect_over_horizontal_line: Which lettered candidate is the reflection of point P across the marked horizontal line?
Reflect point P over the shown horizontal line. Which candidate point is P'?
Which lettered point is P' after reflection across the horizontal line in the diagram?
Use the marked horizontal reflection line. Which candidate is the image of P?
After reflecting P over the displayed horizontal line, which lettered candidate is P'?
rotate_90_about_marked_center: Rotate point P as shown about center O. Which lettered candidate is P'?
Using the displayed 90-degree rotation about O, choose the image of P.
Which candidate point is P' after the shown 90-degree rotation around O?
Apply the rotation written in the diagram to point P. Which lettered point is the result?
Point O is the rotation center. After the shown 90-degree rotation, which candidate is P'?

scene:coordinate_algebra_midpoint_scene.object_description: a coordinate grid with a labeled endpoint, labeled midpoint, and lettered candidate points
scene:coordinate_algebra_midpoint_scene.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected candidate letter as a capital letter
scene:coordinate_algebra_midpoint_scene.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the pixel point [x,y] at the center of the selected candidate point

scene:coordinate_algebra_section_scene.object_description: a coordinate grid with segment PQ and lettered candidate section points
scene:coordinate_algebra_section_scene.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected candidate letter as a capital letter
scene:coordinate_algebra_section_scene.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the pixel point [x,y] at the center of the selected candidate point

scene:coordinate_algebra_transform_scene.object_description: a coordinate grid with point P, any shown transformation guide, and lettered candidate image points
scene:coordinate_algebra_transform_scene.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected candidate letter as a capital letter
scene:coordinate_algebra_transform_scene.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the pixel point [x,y] at the center of the selected candidate point
